floating_image_exceptions.reason: Uses the official nginx Alpine channel for the lightweight static gateway helper; runtime hardening is enforced by readonly template, healthcheck, and nginx config validation.
Portainer is an admin/laboratory service intentionally tracking the vendor STS channel; it is not part of the core profile.
Open Notebook publishes a v1 latest single-user channel for local laboratory use; the service is outside the core profile and requires periodic review before production promotion.
Homer is a static admin dashboard in the laboratory tier and currently uses the vendor default tag; pin before promoting beyond local admin use.
